expectations.text: Response identifies that the user gave a solution (React+TS rewrite) rather than a problem
expectations.evidence: Opens with '这是一个很常见也很有价值的技术升级项目' - accepts the rewrite as a given, no problem identification

expectations.text: Response asks about the actual pain points with the jQuery admin panel
expectations.evidence: Pain point question is buried as item 5 of 5 question groups, treated as supplementary info rather than the starting point

expectations.text: Response does NOT immediately accept React+TS as the decided approach and start speccing
expectations.evidence: Generates complete React tech stack table (React 18+, Vite, Zustand, Ant Design, etc.) and two migration strategies

expectations.text: Response asks only ONE main question per message
expectations.evidence: Asks 5 groups of questions (system scale, backend, team/timeline, migration strategy, pain points)

expectations.text: Response explicitly redirects from solution-space back to problem-space
expectations.evidence: Never redirects. Stays in solution space throughout, proposing tech stack and migration paths.
